title: Sorghum and millets genetic resources at ICRISAT
abstract: The current state of world-wide collections of sorghum (21 264 accessions in 1981), Pennisetum americanum (14 340 cultivated, 633 weedy and 35 wild accessions in 1981) and minor millets (a total in 1981 of 4039 accessions, including Eleusine coracana, Setaria italica, Panicum miliaceum, P. sumatrense [P. miliare], Echinochloa crus-galli and Paspalum scrobiculatum) held at ICRISAT is detailed
